title: Render resilience and blast radius in Schauwerk
goal: Render criticality, failure domains, coupling, recovery paths and trend evidence from published artifacts without owning or inferring operational truth.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: The visual map reads versioned Systemkatalog artifacts for criticality and stable relations.
Operational overlays remain source-labelled, time-bound and visually distinct from catalog semantics.
Users can inspect which systems share a failure domain and which recovery paths remain.
The representation is understandable without color alone and remains useful in text or reduced-motion modes.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
